calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kelsey B. Cooper for Patricia Wastrodowski, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The Court inquired whether counsel had anything they would like to add to their petitions. Ms. Cooper submitted on the papers.

The Court inquired whether both petitions were still necessary if letters of administration were granted. Ms. Cooper confirmed that the petition to establish death was required to obtain documentation from relevant agencies.

Following discussion, the Court granted both petitions and signed both orders in open court.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Continued To Jul-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
